title: Land Manager Reloaded
description: Manage custom sized areas of the world and allocate them to players !
body: [**Land Manager Reloaded**](https://github.com/0ctave/Land-Manager-Reloaded) is originally a port of the [**Land Manager**](https://github.com/thebrightspark/Land-Manager/tree/1.16/src/main/kotlin/brightspark/landmanager) mod with a complete overhaul of the code base and was made to block unwanted interactions with the **world** for the following mods : * **Create** * **Ice And Fire : Dragons** * **Effortless Building** * **Holler Filler** * **Quark** * **Supplementaries** * **Tinkers Construct** * **Storage Drawers** *** Currently only available for Forge **1.16.5** Requires [**Kotlin For Forge**](https://github.com/thedarkcolour/KotlinForForge) to work. *** Features ✔ Claim custom sized areas to protect against griefing ✔ Add members to your claimed area ✔ Toggle whether players can interact with blocks on your claimed area (e.g. chests, waystones, etc) ✔ Toggle whether explosions can happen on your claimed area ✔ Toggle whether passive mobs can spawn on your claimed area ✔ Toggle whether hostile mobs can spawn on your claimed area ✔ Toggle the visibility of claimed areas ✔ Claim requests: makes it so that an admin needs to approve an area before it can be claimed ✔ Ice and Fire mod compatibility - prevents dragons from griefing claimed areas
